overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a beige convertible driving through a futuristic desert city. The clip shows transitions from sunlit highways through a tunnel and into an urban area with holographic billboards, featuring high-quality ray-traced graphics and cinematic camera work.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with rocky cliffs approaching tunnel

agents.ego_description: driving convertible at high speed on multi-lane highway, following a black truck

notable_agents.action: black truck driving ahead in the same lane
blue sedan overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: reddish-brown rocky desert cliffs lining the left side of the highway
scattered palm trees along the right roadside
tall futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades visible in the distance
metal guardrails along both sides of the road
dark tunnel entrance carved into the rock ahead

segments.scene_description: Driving on a sunlit desert highway flanked by rocky cliffs and palm trees, approaching a tunnel entrance with a futuristic city skyline visible in the hazy distance. The vehicle follows a black truck while other cars occasionally pass by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed concrete tunnel with overhead fluorescent lighting

events.description: entering tunnel from bright daylight into dim artificial lighting
approaching tunnel exit with daylight visible at the end

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the tunnel following the truck ahead

notable_agents.action: truck ahead with brake lights occasionally illuminating

entered.detail: grey concrete walls with horizontal lines and occasional red markers
bright linear fluorescent lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: Driving through a well-lit concrete tunnel with fluorescent ceiling lights and grey walls, following a truck ahead. The environment transitions from bright daylight to artificial illumination and back as the exit approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with holographic advertisements and modern architecture

events.description: exiting tunnel into urban area with tall buildings and neon billboards
making a sharp right turn at an intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating city streets with neon signs, making a right turn at an intersection

notable_agents.action: red sports car passing quickly on the left

entered.detail: tall dark glass skyscrapers with geometric designs
large purple and red holographic advertisements on building facades
paved intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into a futuristic urban canyon with towering glass buildings and massive holographic advertisements. The vehicle navigates through city traffic and executes a right turn at an intersection, passing a red sports car.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with guardrails and distant city views

agents.ego_description: cruising on elevated highway with city skyline visible in the background

entered.detail: metal safety guardrails along the elevated roadway edges
hazy mountains visible on the horizon beyond the city

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated highway with metal guardrails, offering expansive views of the distant city skyline and surrounding semi-arid landscape. The road curves gently through sparse vegetation with industrial structures visible on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit desert highway into a futuristic urban center and back out toward an expansive city skyline. It begins by following a black truck along a road flanked by rocky cliffs and palm trees, with a hazy city skyline appearing in the distance. As the vehicle enters a concrete tunnel, the bright daylight shifts into artificial fluorescent illumination before the scene opens once more into a dense urban canyon filled with towering glass buildings and massive holographic advertisements. The camera then navigates through city traffic and executes a right turn past a red sports car, finally ascending onto an elevated highway with metal guardrails. This final stretch curves through sparse vegetation and industrial structures, revealing a wide view of the semi-arid landscape and the distant metropolis.
